message: Node started: Input Elements: A set of N initial bitstrings of varying lengths. A set of M target lengths representing the possible truncation points. A target total length L for all extended bitstrings. Formal Properties: Each input bitstring S_i is a sequence of bits. Each extended bitstring E_i must have length L and must contain S_i as its prefix. Logical Invariants: For any two distinct indices i and j, and for any two truncation lengths k_i and k_j from the set of target lengths, the prefix of E_i of length k_i must not be equal to the prefix of E_j of length k_j. This must hold for all possible combinations of indices and valid truncation lengths. Optimization Criteria: Construct a set of extended bitstrings E_1, E_2, ..., E_N such that all logical invariants are satisfied. The problem asks for any valid construction that meets the length and prefix constraints.
